svg.title: Data Warehouse Architecture – Azure Stack
svg.desc: Professional architecture diagram showing data flow from external providers through Azure Data Factory ELT pipelines into a three-layer Azure Data Lake, then through Azure Logic Apps orchestration to Power BI dashboards and end stakeholders.

g.text: External data providers · Member data · Internal Excel files
Source systems — structured files, third-party feeds, manual uploads
ELT pipelines · Scheduled ingestion · Schema validation
Data ingested as-is · Full history preserved
Pipeline orchestration · Job scheduling · Dependency management
Self-service dashboards · KPI visualisations · Report automation
